title: helleborine helleborine
intro: Helleborine helleborine, also known as Epipactis helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the genus Epipactis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. It has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Helleborine can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
